description: Emerald-green cotton tote with a fold-over cuff in red and navy tartan plaid, detailed with a bright red satin bow on the front.
Midnight-brown cotton top band atop a deep olive-green and black geometric block-print cotton body, forming a small open pouch.
Olive-green cotton top border above an embroidered dark green and brown diamond-patterned cotton body, forming a flat zip pouch.
